title: Rebel Rebel
why_this_song: Rebel Rebel by David Bowie (1974) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "Rebel rebel, you've torn your dress"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You've got your mother in a whirl"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Rebel rebel, how could they know?"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Rebel rebel, your face is a mess"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Rebel rebel, your face is a mess"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Doo doo doo doo-doo doo doo-doo
Doo doo doo doo-doo doo doo-doo

You've got your mother in a whirl
Rebel rebel, you've torn your dress
Rebel rebel, your face is a mess
Rebel rebel, how could they know?
Hot tramp, I love you so

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rebel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rebel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Rebel Rebel" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Rebel Rebel" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Rebel Rebel" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Rebel Rebel"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask David Bowie one question about "Rebel Rebel", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para David Bowie sobre "Rebel Rebel", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
